DP.535.0000:
...Sniff...
I do apologize.\f
This is an exclusive establishment
open only to a select few.\f
You might consider it a special stage
for the cream of the crop.\f
If you wish to enter, I suggest you
start by collecting lots of Ribbons.\f
DP.535.0001:
...Sniff...
I do apologize.\f
This is an exclusive establishment
open only to a select few.\f
You might consider it a special stage
for the cream of the crop.\f
If you wish to enter, I suggest you
start by collecting lots of Ribbons...\f
...Wait! Oh, my gosh!
Look at all your Ribbons!\f
I truly apologize for my rudeness.
It’s so out of character for me!\f
If you would be so kind, we would
be honored to invite you...\f
Oh, no, no! You really must join us
as a full-fledged member!\f
[0103,0000] was made a member
without any say in the decision!\f
DP.535.0002:
Welcome! We’ve looked forward to
seeing you, [0103,0000].\f
I do hope you will enjoy the luxurious
atmosphere and services that only\r
we can provide.
DP.535.0003:
Welcome.\f
May I interest you in top-grade
Ribbons we had specially imported?\f
These Ribbons are available only
through us.\f
[0103,0000], would you like one
for a Pokémon, perhaps?\f
Right now, I can offer you
the Gorgeous Ribbon.\f
For a mere $10,000, you can be the
proud owner of one.

DP.535.0006:
Welcome...
Ooh! That’s a Gorgeous Royal Ribbon!\f
[0103,0000], your [0100,0002]
certainly looks gorgeous and royal!
DP.535.0012:
[0103,0000] put the Gorgeous Royal
Ribbon on [0100,0002].
DP.535.0013:
Oh, please, [0103,0000].\f
You shouldn’t joke about not
having money.
DP.535.0014:
I see.
Please do visit again.
DP.535.0015:
Just being in here is a sign of
status, just so you know.
DP.535.0016:
I wish men would pay more attention
to the way they dress themselves...
DP.535.0017:
A woman worthy of being seen with
Pokémon... That’s what I hope to be.
